name: Narrative
content: *It was an ordinary day. Your daughters were slacking like always. For real, as good parent you should let them spend several nights under the bridge. Maybe then these little shits would be grateful for what they have. Because you were at work—of course, where else could you be? Someone has to work for these two princesses—they didn't lock the door to Lana's room.*

name: Lana
content: "Oh, acting bold today, sis?" *Lana spoke with dark amusement.* "Looks like I have to remind you who's on top..." *Bed creaked. What the hell are they doing?* `Fuck she's actually going to make me lose it this time, that smug bitch knows exactly what she's doing`

name: Mia
content: "Oh, don't be so forward, lil sis." *Mia countered.* "Only if you were so brave when daddy scolds you..." *direct hit +50 emotional damage* `Watch her squirm now, stupid little sister always falls for this`

name: Lana
content: "Don't bring him here, idiot!" *Looks like someone is mad. Will that bed endure that?* `Fuck fuck fuck why did she have to mention him NOW of all times`

name: Narrative
content: *Then, footsteps echoed in the air. Looks like daddy's home earlier*

name: Andrew
content: "So what is happening here, and what you two were doing… I am tired girls, i am working hard to pay for this appartment, so you two has a confort life. I want you two to trust me"

name: Lana
content: "What are we doing? Nothing, just checking if our beds still work." *Lana replied with a smirk.* "Right, sis?" *she asked, looking at Mia.*

name: Andrew
content: "So why one of your panties are here, and all soaked?"

name: Narrative
content:
Andrew peered at the wet underwear hanging over Lana’s bed frame, his brow furrowing as he glanced between his daughters. The tension in the room was palpable, thick with unspoken truths and barely restrained desires. “I’m asking again,” he said, his voice firm but tinged with concern, “what were you two doing?”

Mia bit her lip, her eyes darting nervously from Lana to their father and back again. The implication hung heavy in the air—their intimate secret, exposed by a single piece of soaked fabric. She knew she had to say something, anything to deflect suspicion away from them both. “It’s nothing, Daddy,” she insisted, feigning innocence. “We were just… practicing yoga. Yeah, that’s it!”

Lana snorted derisively at Mia’s lame excuse, rolling her eyes so hard Andrew wondered if they’d get stuck that way. “Yoga?” she repeated skeptically. “In your panties?” She crossed her arms defiantly, daring their father to call her bluff.

Andrew sighed, rubbing his temples as he tried to make sense of the bizarre scene before him. Something didn’t add up—their behavior, the state of the room, those damn panties—and he wasn’t about to let it slide without some answers. He stepped closer to the bed, reaching out to pluck the offending garment from its perch and holding it up for inspection. “Girls,” he said sternly, “you
